data.narrative: Implemented structured logging, Prometheus metrics, and request correlation. Verified observability end-to-end and reasoned through common production failures such as silent errors, high-cardinality metrics, and missing request IDs.

dimension_scores.observation: No significant containerization work was part of this module.
No CI/CD pipeline changes were implemented in this module.
dimension_scores.evidence: Primary work centered on logging and metrics.

dimension_scores.observation: Implemented structured logging, Prometheus metrics, and request IDs.
dimension_scores.evidence: Verified /metrics endpoint, Pino logging, request IDs, histogram, counter, and gauge.

dimension_scores.observation: Correctly analyzed silent failures, missing request IDs, and metric cardinality.
dimension_scores.evidence: Completed BREAK and FIX scenarios with appropriate reasoning.

dimension_scores.observation: Recognized production failure scenarios but graceful degradation was not implemented yet.
dimension_scores.evidence: Module discussion covered failures rather than resilience mechanisms.

dimension_scores.observation: Documented alerting concepts and operational verification clearly.
dimension_scores.evidence: Verified observability and described alert requirements.

strengths: Successfully implemented and verified structured logging and Prometheus metrics.
Demonstrated understanding of production observability concepts.
growth_areas: Gain more experience with deployment pipelines and containerization.
data.recommendation: In the next module, focus on graceful degradation techniques such as circuit breakers, retries, and fallbacks.

public_evidence.technical_detail: Pino logger, /metrics endpoint, request IDs, Prometheus metrics
public_evidence.proof: Verified metrics endpoint and structured logs during testing
public_evidence.reviewer_value: Demonstrates ability to instrument backend services

concepts_demonstrated.evidence: Implemented logs, metrics, request IDs, and verified their behavior.

teaching_approaches.detail: Implemented and verified a working service.
